title: wtf is Loop Engineer & how to setup for real
summary: Loop Engineer is a technique for building and configuring AI agents. The content includes a GitHub repository with codebase harness and knowledge template, plus a workshop offered through AI Builder Club.
writeup: AI Jason explains the Loop Engineer framework and walks through setting it up for building AI agents. The video pairs the explanation with a GitHub template repository and a workshop, so the concepts connect to concrete, runnable scaffolding rather than theory alone. The relevance is practical: it covers agentic workflows and gives a starting point for implementing AI agents with the framework.
